_meta.notes: Title-keyword allowlist for project inference. Cloud sessions have no `project` or `cwd`; this file is the source-of-truth for project inference from session titles. Each entry: displayName is the canonical human name, pattern is a case-insensitive regex tested against the title. First-match-wins in `inferProject.ts`. Additions should be accompanied by a test-fixture update. The entries below are illustrative placeholders — fork this file and replace with your own projects.
